title: anemopsis californica
intro: Anemopsis californica, also known as California or western skunkbush or western yarrow, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory to relieve pain and reduce swelling. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which are made by steeping the plant's roots in hot water.
